titleStmt.title: SII 11.165: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 165. (B.K. No. 45 of 1927-28.) KAKKŪRU, MUṆḌARAGI PĒṬHĀ, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE MĀRUTI TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI), who was ruling the kingdom from his nelevīḍu at Kalyāṇa and introduces his subordinate Mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara Permmāḍiyarasa, the governor of Māsavāḍi Hundred and forty, who sprang from the Yādava family, was the lord of Dvārāvatīpura and an aṅkakāṟa of Mārtaṇḍadēva. It records the gift of land made by Kāḷigāvuṇḍa with the sanction of Permmāḍiyarasa to the temple of Mallikārjunadēva built by Perggaḍe Jōgiśeṭṭi at Kakkūru in Māsavāḍi-nāḍu included in Kuntala-dēśa.
The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 38, Vijaya, Paushya, paurṇami, Wednesday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, vyatīpāta = A.D. 1113, December 24, Wednesday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicandracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya
śaṁbhavē . namastasmai varāhāya līlayā caratē mahīṁ khurāntaragatō ya
sya mērōḥ khaṇakhaṇāyatē . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha
mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cā
ḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhi
vriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire kalyāṇada
nelevīḍinū ḷsukhasankathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttumire . svasti samadhigata
paṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara dvārāvatīpuravarādhīśvara
yādavavaṁśōdbhavaṁ . yuvatījanacittōdbhavaṁ . suvarṇnagaruḍadhvajaṁ . vijayakīrti dhva
jaṁ sēguṇabhīmaṁ . saṁgrāmaparaśurāmaṁ . kaligaḷādityaṁ . bhuvanajanastutya . Ā
ḷiṁ muṁniṟivaṁ śauryyamaṁ meṟevaṁ jaṁguḷimaṁneyabēṁṭekāṟaṁ mārtaṇḍadēvanaṁ
kakāṟaṁ . śrēmanmallikārdanadēvapādārādhakaṁ . sakaḷabaḷasādhakaṁ . nāmādisa
mastapraśastisahitaṁ . śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ permmāḍiyarasaru mā
savāḍi nūṟanālvattumaṁ sudharmmadiṁ duṣṭanigrahaṁ śiṣṭapratipāḷanaṁgeydu sukhasaṁ
kathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyutta mire . vananidhimēkhaḷeyeṁbina manavarataṁ
celvuvetta dhātrīvanitānanado ḷaḷavaṭṭa tiḷakamidenisidu deḷegeseye ne
gaḻda kuntaḷadēśaṁ . Enisida kuntaḷadēśado ḷanunayadiṁ māsavāḍināḍoḷe kakkūra
nava mahimeya nanupama mene negaḻdu nāḍeyuṁ sogayisuguṁ .
svasti samastaguṇasampannaṁ gōtrapavitraṁ perggaḍe jōgiseṭṭi kakkūra mallikārjjuna dēvara dēgulamaṁ
māḍisi Ī dēvargge takka bhūmi vērkku venal kāḷigāvuṁḍa nante geyveneṁdu permmāḍi yarasargge biṁna
paṁgeydu cāḷukyavikramava(ri)rṣada 38 neya vijayasaṁvatsarada pauṣyada paurṇnamā
syeU Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁti vyatīpātadaṁdu dēvara Aṁgabhōgakkaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭi
tajīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ sarvvabādhāparihāramāgi biṭṭa bhūmi Arahaṭada baṭṭeyiṁ
baḍaga Aragilvāḷa holada mēreya mūḍa haraḷakeyi mattaru 5 Intī dharmmamaṁ ra
kṣisidātaṁ paṁnircchāsira kavileyaṁ kōḍuṁkoḷagumaṁ ponnoḷ kaṭṭisi kurukṣētra
prayāgeyoḷ caturvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇargge dānaṁgeyda phalamakku . Ī
dharmmama naḷidātaṁge kurukṣētra vāprayāgeyoḷā caturvvēdapāragarappa
brāhmaṇaruma nerkkōṭi tapōdhanarumaṁ paṁnircchāsira kavileyuma naḷida mahā
pātakanakkuṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣa sahaśrā
ṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . bahubhi rvvasudhā dattā rājabhissagarādibhiḥ ya
sya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnripā
ṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētān bhāvinaḥ pārtthivēṁdrānbhū
yō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ .
Digital edition of SII 11.165 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
